title: Friday Sermon 26 July 2002
description:
They desire to blow out the light of Allah with their mouths but Allah shall perfect His light even as the disbelievers hate.

('The Holy Quran'.  Al Saff [The Ranks]: 9).

The Promised Messiah (on whom be please) stated that those negligent of their end did not value this association but that Allah the Almighty would bring about His endeavours and grant success to this community:

Allah the Almighty confides in me again and again.  The water which Allah the Almighty has given me to drink would also be given to my devotees and as Allah the Almighty has supported me so would He support my sincere devotees.  
 
Nobody can change the plan of the All-Powerful God.  Most certainly the religion of God shall prevail and peace will be established in the world through Islam.  I have come to reveal the true face of Islam.  
  
Remember well that the true one is never a coward.

(Unpublished Register Riwayat e Sahaba: vi. 86 – 89).

We praise you and call down blessings on you.  People wish to put out Allah’s light with the breath of their mouths and Allah will not leave this light without perfection, even though the disbelievers might resent it.  We shall soon cause fear to enter their hearts.  When the help of Allah comes, and victory and the hosts turn to us, it will be asked: ‘Was this not true?’

(Ahmad.  'Barahin e Ahmadiyya: iii'.  Safir e Hind Press, 1882.  'Ruhani Khazain'.  266ff1. English: Islam International Publications Ltd, 2014.  210, 211).

The text https://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST20020726-UR.pdf
